ogTitle: Duckmaloi vs Duffys Forest: Climate Safety

heading: Duckmaloi vs Duffys Forest — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Duckmaloi, New South Wales and Duffys Forest, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Duckmaloi has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Duffys Forest (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Duckmaloi or Duffys Forest safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Duckmaloi has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Duffys Forest scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Duckmaloi scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Duffys Forest scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Duckmaloi or Duffys Forest?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Duckmaloi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
